title: GainWix Mobile App
description: A mobile companion app for the GainWix WhatsApp automation platform — designed and built solo using no-code tools, delivered in under a week.
longDescription:
Designed and built the GainWix mobile companion app as a solo project using no-code development tools — without writing a single line of code.

The mobile app brings the core GainWix WhatsApp automation features to smartphones, allowing users to manage contacts, monitor campaigns, create broadcasts, and track analytics on the go. Built entirely by a designer leveraging AI tools and no-code platforms, delivered production-ready in under one week.
highlights: Mobile app built solo in under one week
Zero coding — fully designed & built with no-code tools
